## Summary
<!-- One paragraph: what changed and why. -->

## Related issues
<!-- Closes #N, refs #M. -->

## Type
<!-- feat / fix / chore / docs / refactor / test -->

## Testing
<!-- What was tested. New tests added? Manual verification? -->

## Screenshots
<!-- For UI changes. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`make check`)
- [ ] Conventional Commit format used
- [ ] No new copyleft dependencies
- [ ] AGENTS.md / docs updated if architecture changed
- [ ] New ADR if a non-obvious decision was made
- [ ] Built nothing from `docs/ideas.md` without an ADR
